scope.summary: Log in one account from imported credentials and surface its public profile: zalo/ login_profile() returns AccountProfile, command/ login returns it to the UI, verified by a live single-login smoke.
goals: zalo/ login_profile maps types::Credentials into zca-rust and returns AccountProfile (own id + best-effort display name)
command/ login parses+validates the payload and returns AccountProfile (no token values cross IPC)
Live smoke logs in a real account and the UI shows its id/name
nonGoals: Persisting credentials or the session (Phase 3 keychain)

acceptance.description: zalo/ login_profile returns an API-backed AccountProfile; empty credentials are rejected offline.
command/ login returns AccountProfile to the UI after validating the payload.
A real account logs in and the resolved profile has a non-empty account id (UI shows account id/name).
